company_context: Attention Required! | Cloudflare Please enable cookies. Sorry, you have been blocked You are unable to access beyondtrust.com Why have I been blocked? This website is using a security service to protect itself from online attacks. The action you just performed triggered the security solution. There are several actions that could trigger this block including submitting a certain word or phrase, a SQL command or malformed data. What can I do to resolve this? You can email the site owner to let them know you were blocked. Please include what you were doing when this page came up and the Cloudflare Ray ID found at the bottom of this page. Cloudflare Ray ID: 9d985a884b169a55 • Your IP: Click to reveal 49.47.193.174 • Performance & security by Cloudflare

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours make the most out of their data. I came across your company, BeyondTrust, and noticed that you're currently experiencing some security issues with your website, specifically with Cloudflare. I think our solution could help alleviate some of those pains.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Ah, yeah. We've been having some issues with Cloudflare. But to be honest, we're not really looking to bring in any new vendors right now. We're pretty swamped with other priorities.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. However, I'd like to highlight that our solution can actually help you streamline your data processing, which in turn could free up some resources for your team to focus on those other priorities. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think it's worth exploring. Can I ask, what's currently taking up most of your team's time and resources?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (firmly) Look, I appreciate the offer, but like I said, we're just not in a position to take on anything new right now. We're in the middle of a major migration to the cloud, and that's consuming most of our bandwidth. I'm not sure how your solution would integrate with our existing infrastructure, and to be frank, I'm not convinced it would be worth the investment.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about integration and ROI. We've actually worked with several companies who have similar tech stacks to yours, and our solution is designed to be flexible and adaptable. As for ROI, we've seen our customers achieve significant cost savings and efficiency gains. Would you be open to a brief demo to see how our solution could address your specific pain points?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) I'm not sure that would be necessary. Like I said, we're just not prioritizing this right now. And even if we were, I'm not sure we'd be willing to pay the premium that I'm sure your solution commands. We've got to be mindful of our budget, and I'm not convinced that your solution would be the best use of our resources.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about budget, and I'd be happy to discuss pricing with you in more detail. However, I want to emphasize that our solution is designed to provide long-term value and savings. Can I ask, would you be willing to revisit this conversation in a few months when your cloud migration is further along?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (firmly) Alex, I appreciate your persistence, but I think we're just going to have to pass on this for now. We've got too much on our plate, and this just isn't a priority for us. I appreciate the offer, but I think we'll have to decline.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and explored potential creative solutions to help the buyer prioritize the seller's solution amidst their current cloud migration project. Sentiment: Negative
